description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pytest that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13) across different operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest). For each job, check out the repository, set up the specified Python version allowing pre-releases, install dependencies with pip, and run pytest with verbose output and doctest modules.
